title: Miss Oyu
actors: Kinuyo Tanaka, Nobuko Otowa, Yûji Hori
plot: Shinnosuke is introduced to Shizu as a prospective wife, but he falls in love with her widowed sister Oyu. Convention forbids Oyu to marry because she has to raise her son as the head of her husband's family. Oyu convinces Shinnos...
